chapter: Chapter: When People Rebel – 1857 and After

questions.question: In which year did the Revolt of 1857 begin?
questions.explanation: The Revolt of 1857 started in the year 1857.

questions.question: Where did the Revolt of 1857 begin?
questions.explanation: The revolt began at Meerut when sepoys rebelled against British officers.

questions.question: Who was the last Mughal emperor during the Revolt of 1857?
questions.explanation: Bahadur Shah Zafar was declared the leader of the rebels during the revolt.

questions.question: Who was the queen of Jhansi who fought bravely in the Revolt of 1857?
questions.explanation: Rani Lakshmibai of Jhansi played an important role in the revolt.

questions.question: Who were the Indian soldiers in the British army called?
questions.explanation: Indian soldiers serving in the British army were known as sepoys.
